episodes.title: HE SPIED ON THE MASONS! Infiltrating the Freemasonic Cult With Joshua Abraham - Fight Back Ep. 214
episodes.description:
Joshua Abraham claims he infiltrated the Freemasons to learn their secret rites and rituals. In this episode of Fight Back Podcast, Joshua talks to Jake Shields about what he says he experienced first hand being inducted into Freemasonry. Is this just a social club for old men or are the freemasons involved in manipulating our current political landscape?
